testsuite.name: E2E — SignIn contra backend real

testcase.name: POST /intrale/signin con credenciales seed responde 200 con tokens
POST /intrale/signin con email inexistente responde error

testsuite.system-out: 19:14:35.254 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Iniciando Playwright [ApiSignInE2ETest] — baseUrl=http://localhost:80, recordings=C:\Workspaces\Intrale\platform\qa\recordings 19:14:36.380 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Tracing iniciado [ApiSignInE2ETest] 19:14:36.979 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - SignIn response: status=200 19:14:36.983 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - SignIn body: {"idToken":"eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJraWQiOiJkdW1teSIsImFsZyI6IlJTMjU2In0..Q-vmGMVI46us4g87W81XjtwlwLJvxn2hsAcnJTEc0QFscQYtH3xLX-8c_81JhyF6V_G84riorZiyWiSg0uOdu2JNnzUyOe5j78F_J5g9G1hajCmlFFOuohjwFvgolE7c7ZgLDwnwiawbpmfzCUR9aySFZoYfVLbThsOHn6e3LNGc1Wzepz0W5fvUdnRV-G8IYLdfiH6bE1IRuZNn-vEnZj76pNtKMupMsJE1tOJy6fCvM8gCSSWinzRGkdCRhhkYMvDsLkkOw6H6LWJQkP0ld_Zifd8eIP8W0f7svcA99JXHITKrNeeRzLviUflUyx5BLgXfVoprUEP0yj3W2fpAxQ","accessToken":"eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJraWQiOiJkdW1teSIsImFsZyI6IlJTMjU2In0..AyaOJ44QZ2Z-lqyC6LTkvQwTjRBEWVoPLpQKcjvhIyZUsGsV6MW7zeo1CL2vS1tLJ9ZFfHI7olxNla-o6m5mW-hnCyXv6VGAPKddFKmpeRvQ7aVAXQ1Y0hA-WFVpMximU0yKlKg0pfPzjHknSLn7OBMYdJYT7shO64VwMukpy0W0JVFGRK2HCa8lMhwVtJtxQO3SsC2kB-foLSFO5I0GJx1ROpkmit_eWHy3nXL2O-TMpIOV_6a3sMXJVTzc1c9Tzo5kyWZAVx6kcaEY--4FV0muQKZz4OvsDEFE-5wShY5-UNm2MHAzIMxpIn90NN4q_A4-tZmR-4DF8FAf9Ecv3Q","refreshToken":"db2adfdf-8014-4fc2-b06c-cf59921f974a","statusCode":{"value":200,"description":"OK"}} 19:14:37.005 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - SignIn sin body: status=400 19:14:37.085 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - SignIn password incorrecto: status=401 19:14:37.140 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - SignIn email inexistente: status=500 19:14:37.156 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Trace guardado: C:\Workspaces\Intrale\platform\qa\recordings\ApiSignInE2ETest-trace.zip 19:14:37.214 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Cerrando Playwright [ApiSignInE2ETest]
